title: World Refugee Day Celebration 2024
description: Documentation of the World Refugee Day celebration held at Dzaleka Refugee Camp on June 20, 2024. The event featured cultural performances from Congolese, Burundian, Rwandan, and Somali communities, speeches by community leaders and UNHCR representatives, a football tournament, and an art exhibition by camp youth. Over 3,000 residents participated in the day's activities.
